name: דם
description: כל השחקנים שמים קלף אקראי מידם על חבילת הקלפים שלהם

name: כינים
description: כל דמות שבאותו איזור כמו משה חוטפת 1 נזק

name: ערב
description: הקלף הזה נחשב למתקפת מרחק.

name: שחין
description: כל דמות שישירות ליד משה חוטפת 3 נזק

name: ברד
description: עד תחילת התור הבא של משה, ערך התזוזה של לוחמים אויבים יורד ב1.

name: ארבה
description: כל השחקנים היריבים זורקים שני קלפים מידם.

name: חושך
description: הזז את כל הדמויות על הלוח לאיזה מקום שיתחשק.

name: מכת בכורות
description: מהתור הזה ואילך, בתחילת כל תור של שחקן יריב, הגיבור שלהם מקבל 1 נזק.

name: מכה אימתנית
description: After combat: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 2 spaces.

name: מן האפר
description: During combat: You may BOOST this attack. (This is in addition to any boost from King Arthur's special ability.)

name: אמת
description: After combat: Draw 2 cards.

name: מגן העם
description: After combat: Move King Arthur up to 5 spaces.

name: הכניסני תחת כנפיך
description: After combat: If King Arthur has 4 or less health but is not defeated, set his health to 8.

name: שקיעת השמש
description: תחפש בערימת הקלפים שלך עבור הקלף "מת" ושים אותו בידך.

name: אמונה
description: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Add 2 of them to your hand and put the other 2 back on top of your deck, in any order.

name: בעזרת השמיים
description: During combat: Prevent all damage. After combat: You may place your fighter in any space.

name: האותיות הקדושות
description: After combat: If you won the combat, draw 2 cards.
Choose any space in Merlin's zone. Deal 2 damage to each opposing fighter in that space and in one adjacent space. If at least one fighter is defeated this way, draw 1 card.

name: על פני תהום
description: Move each fighter up to 3 spaces. (This includes opposing fighters.)
After combat: Move your fighter up to 4 spaces.

name: שינוי משמעותי
description: During combat: If your fighter started this turn in a different space, this card's value is 5 instead.

name: הטעיה
description: Immediately: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.

name: ארגון מחדש
description: After combat: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
LOKI: Place an opposing fighter adjacent to Loki. NOT LOKI: Loki reveals a card in our hand. Discard that card.
DURING COMBAT: If your opponent has more cards in their hand than you, this card's value is 6 instead.
LOKI: AFTER COMBAT: Draw 1 cards. NOT LOKI: AFTER COMBAT: Deal 2 damage to your hero.
LOKI: DURING COMBAT: Swap the values of your card and your opponent's card. NOT LOKI: AFTER COMBAT: Loki recovers 3 health.
DURING COMBAT: Choose one effect: add +1 to this card's value for each card in your opponent's hand, gain 1 action.
AFTER COMBAT: Draw 1 card. If your opponent played a TRICK, draw 2 cards instead.
LOKI: DURING COMBAT: Your opponent may discard a card. If they don't, subtract 3 from their card's value. NOT LOKI: AFTER COMBAT: Loki returns the top card of their discard pile to their hand.
IMMEDIATELY: If your opponent played a card, return it to their hand, look at their hand, and choose a card for them to play.
